compliance_map.evidence_summary: This file IS the self-check. Every rule in the implementor rulebook was walked mechanically and checked against the implementation.
Bug 4 guard uses stat() + ENOENT check. All states tested: file exists (throw), file not found (proceed), stat error (log + proceed). No terminal state is silently swallowed.
Bug 1 fix (Codex stdin -> temp file) applied to BOTH the canonical shared invoker AND the local re-export copy. IMP-004 requires fixing all copies — both are fixed.

compliance_map.evidence_location: tools/agent-role-builder/src/services/role-generator.ts RevisionResult interface, board.ts revision call site
compliance_map.evidence_summary: RevisionResult interface (new) is immediately used by reviseRoleMarkdown() return type and consumed by board.ts. RevisionFeedback.newRuleIds (new field) is passed from board.ts line 357. No orphan schemas.

After removing generateComplianceMap() and generateFixItemsMap(), grepped for all references. Only a comment reference remains (line 391). No dead imports, no dead parameters. The invoke import is still used by learning engine and executeParticipant.

compliance_map.evidence_location: board.ts Bug 2 fix catch block (line 345-347), role-generator.ts parse catch blocks
compliance_map.evidence_summary: All new catch blocks log to stderr with component prefix and error message. Bug 2 rulebook update catch: console.error('[board] Failed to update rulebook...'). Revision parse catches: console.error('[role-generator] Failed to parse...'). No empty catches.
No new stubs or placeholder code introduced. All new code paths are fully implemented.

Bug 1+6 fix writes prompt to temp file and loads via shell variable ($PROMPT). The prompt content never appears as a direct shell argument string. Claude and Gemini continue to use stdin piping (unchanged, working). Codex uses bash -c with a file-read pattern, not direct argument passing.

fix_items_map.title: Codex stdin unreliable for large prompts
fix_items_map.summary: Both callCodex() implementations (shared/llm-invoker/invoker.ts and shared-imports.ts) rewritten to write prompt to temp file, load via shell variable, pass as CLI argument. Claude and Gemini stdin piping unchanged.

fix_items_map.title: Rulebook never updated by learning engine
fix_items_map.summary: After learning engine returns new_rules, board.ts now reads current rulebook.json, deduplicates by ID, writes updated rulebook back to disk, and updates the in-memory currentRulebook array.

fix_items_map.title: New rules not flagged in revision prompt
fix_items_map.summary: Added newRuleIds field to RevisionFeedback interface. Board.ts tracks genuinely new rule IDs and passes them to reviseRoleMarkdown(). The revision prompt marks new rules with '[NEW — added this round]' prefix.

fix_items_map.title: Duplicate runs on same job ID
fix_items_map.summary: Added stat() check at the start of buildRole() for existing result.json. If it exists, throws descriptive error. ENOENT (no file) proceeds normally. Other stat errors are logged as non-fatal.

fix_items_map.title: npx tsx path doubling
fix_items_map.summary: Added documentation comment at the top of index.ts explaining the correct invocation pattern and warning against npx tsx.

fix_items_map.title: 7 LLM calls per round (efficiency)
fix_items_map.summary: Merged compliance map + fix items map + revision into 1 LLM call. Removed standalone generateComplianceMap() and generateFixItemsMap(). reviseRoleMarkdown() now returns RevisionResult with markdown, complianceMap, and fixItemsMap. Response parsed via XML-tagged sections with graceful degradation (empty array on parse failure).
